name: Ameriwest Critical Metals Inc.
description: Ameriwest Critical Metals Inc. (formerly Ameriwest Lithium Inc.) is a Vancouver-based junior exploration company focused on its flagship Bornite Copper-Gold-Silver Project in Oregon, a historically drill-defined breccia pipe deposit with high-grade copper averaging approximately 2.4% Cu. The company also holds the Xeno Rare Earth Project in British Columbia and lithium properties in Nevada and Arizona. Ameriwest is at the early exploration stage, having completed a 3D geological model at Bornite and planning a maiden drill program.
